page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.large is an arm64-based virtual machine instance powered by the custom Alibaba YiTian710 processor from the Yitian family. It features 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz, with no hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate average single-core performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1814.78 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1423.0. However, multi-core and specialized workloads show limitations. The multi-core CPU performance is weak, scoring 3598.07 in stress-ng and 2555.0 in Geekbench. Cryptographic and vector instruction sets are limited, resulting in poor Passmark CPU encryption and extended instruction test scores. Memory bandwidth is average for uncached large blocks at 39.5 GB/sec but weak for cached small blocks and write operations.

Given its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance offers a compute-oriented resource density. Qualitatively, it represents a cost-efficient entry point for arm64 architecture testing and lightweight single-threaded tasks, though it presents clear performance tradeoffs in multi-threaded processing, image rendering, and database operations. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, basic text processing, single-threaded utility scripts, and software compilation tasks that do not require high memory capacity or parallel processing power.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.large is an arm64 virtual server powered by a 2.75 GHz Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs, 2 physical cores, and 4.0 GB of RAM, running on a KVM hypervisor with 2 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data shows average single-core CPU and text processing capabilities, but weak multi-core scaling, memory write speeds, and database performance. Cryptographic and vector instruction performance is also limited. Qualitatively, this instance provides a cost-effective entry point for arm64 development and testing. It is best suited for lightweight single-threaded workloads, basic web serving, and simple text processing tasks where high memory capacity and parallel compute scaling are not required.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.large is an arm64 virtual server with 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and a 2.75 GHz YiTian710 processor, offering entry-level compute performance for lightweight single-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.large is an arm64 virtual server featuring 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and a 2.75 GHz YiTian710 processor on a KVM hypervisor.
tagline: An entry-level arm64 virtual server featuring dedicated custom silicon for lightweight single-threaded workloads and basic utility tasks.

2 dedicated vCPUs and 4.0 GB of system memory
KVM hypervisor with 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
